title: Custom Authorities
description: View, create, update and delete your account's custom authorities
noneDescription: You have not created any custom authorities for this account yet.
createDialogDescription: Grant a specific operation permission to another account or key under conditions you define.
deleteDialogDescription: This will permanently delete the custom authority {{id}}. This action cannot be undone.
enabledHint: Whether the custom authority is active.
operationTypeHint: The operation this authority grants permission for.
operationTypeLockedHint: The operation type cannot be changed after creation.
authHint: Weight threshold plus account, key and address auths.
searchAccountDescription: Search for the account to authorize.
restrictionsHint: An array of restriction objects. Leave as [] for none.
restrictionsToRemoveHint: An array of restriction index numbers to remove, e.g. [0, 1].
invalidAuthJson: The authority field contains invalid JSON.
invalidRestrictionsJson: The restrictions field contains invalid JSON.
